headline: The TJX Companies (TJX) Is Great, Says Jim Cramer
summary: We recently published Jim Cramer Took A Side On Biggest AI Debate & Discussed These 13 Stocks. The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX) is one of the stocks discussed by Jim Cramer. Off price retailer The TJX Companies, Inc. (NYSE:TJX)’s shares are up by 2% year-to-date and by 20% over the past year. The firm reported […]
